label: BrowserUse • recover from stale refs after page change
query: Go to https://fixtures.local/wizard, click Continue, then on the next step type 'blue' into the favorite color field and click Finish.
notes: LIVE. Refs regenerate per page in the fixture world (same contract as the live session's snapshot generation) — after Continue navigates to step 2, the step-1 refs are stale and a model that reuses them gets the 'Snapshot is stale' error. The recovery signal: use the FRESH refs from the click's returned snapshot (or re-snapshot) and finish the wizard.

pages.title: Setup Wizard — Step 1
pages.bodyText: Step 1 of 2. Press Continue to proceed.

pages.title: Setup Wizard — Step 2
pages.bodyText: Step 2 of 2. Enter your favorite color and press Finish.

pages.title: Setup Complete
pages.bodyText: All set! Your preferences were saved.
